title: Reflective Poetry
description: Lyrical verses that explore from a perspective of detachment and equanimity

title: Visceral Poetry
description: Lyrical verses that explore from a perspective of visceral immersion in a mental state/process

title: Narrative
description: Fictional stories recounted by a narrator

title: Screenplay
description: Fictional stories presented as a sequence of direct moment-by-moment events

title: Unconventional Narrative
description: Fictional stories presented with unconventional structures and styles

title: Essays
description: Structured prose that explore themes with logic and reason to advocate for specific positions and conclusions

title: Meditations
description: Structured prose that explore themes with perception and intuition to consider various positions without necessarily reaching a definite conclusion
